name: Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate over hot water.
2. Sift the flour, baking soda, and baking powder together; set aside.
3. In a bowl of a mixer, cream the butter.
4. Add the sugar slowly and continue to beat.
5. Add the vanilla, then the eggs one at a time.
6. Add the melted chocolate and stir to blend.
7. Stir in the dry ingredients by hand.
8. Add the milk; mix until just blended.
9. Cover and refrigerate dough for 30 minutes before rolling out.
10. Preheat oven to 375°F.
11. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
12. Scoop out a portion of dough and roll it out on a well-floured surface.
13. Roll the dough into rounds or other desired shapes, about 1/4 inch thick.
14. Re-roll scraps and cut again if needed.
15. Place cookies on the prepared cookie sheet, leaving room for expansion.
16. Bake for 6 to 8 minutes. Do not overbake.
